finding_results.notes: Anchored the chapter opening to Wednesday morning so the sick call, drive, and return sit on July 13, 2005, and updated both public date markers to match the continuity sheet.

finding_results.notes: Reworked the cited emphasis clusters so they resolve through complete sentences, physical detail, and action rather than repeated clipped ladders. The object-trespass beat, Mort-recognition beat, threshold paralysis, and closing recognition now vary cadence without softening the chapter's guilt, trespass, or family shock.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised Chapter 3 to resolve the July 13 continuity requirement and compress the late parking-lot material so the scene lands on embodied consequence instead of explanatory thesis.
Chapter 3 now carries its major emotional landings with more rhythmic variance while preserving the chapter spine, continuity, and unsanitized pressure.
